name: vibra-code
description: Open-Source AI App Builder for Mobile — Build apps with AI like vibecodeapp, rork, lovable & bolt.new but fully open source. Describe what you want → AI builds it → Preview on your phone. Built with Claude Code, Expo, React Native, Convex, E2B.
readme_summary: Vibra Code is an open-source AI-powered mobile app builder that allows users to describe their desired app in plain English, which is then generated by AI. The generated apps can be previewed natively on a user's phone, and the entire system is self-hostable and customizable.
key_features: Describe app in plain English, AI builds it
primary_use_case: Enabling users to easily create and preview mobile applications using AI, with the flexibility of an open-source and self-hostable solution.
cover_image_prompt: A whimsical, friendly robot architect standing in a vibrant, cloud-based workshop. The robot is holding a blueprint that is magically transforming into a miniature, glowing mobile phone displaying a colorful app interface. Swirling around the robot are streams of English words and abstract code snippets, feeding into the blueprint. In the background, a subtle E2B sandbox environment is visible, with Claude Code's logo subtly integrated into the workshop's machinery. The overall mood is creative and empowering, with a clean, 3D isometric illustration style and bright, optimistic lighting.

name: pocketpaw
description: Your AI agent in 30 seconds. Not 30 hours. Self-hosted, open-source personal AI with desktop installer, multi-agent Command Center(Deep Work), and 7-layer security. Anthropic, OpenAI, or Ollama.
readme_summary: PocketPaw is a self-hosted, open-source personal AI agent designed for quick deployment. It offers a desktop installer and a web dashboard, allowing users to interact with their AI through various platforms like Discord, Slack, and Telegram, ensuring data privacy and avoiding cloud lock-in.
key_features: Multi-platform communication (Discord, Slack, WhatsApp, Telegram, Browser)
Supports Anthropic, OpenAI, or Ollama LLMs
primary_use_case: To provide users with a private, self-hosted personal AI assistant that can be easily installed and integrated into their daily communication workflows.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, anthropomorphic paw print character sitting at a clean, modern desk, holding a glowing orb that represents AI. The orb is connected by subtle digital streams to various communication icons (Discord, Slack, Telegram, browser window) floating around the desk, indicating the AI's ability to interact through multiple channels. The character is looking directly at the viewer with a helpful expression. The background is a soft, blurred home office environment, emphasizing the personal and local nature of the AI. Small, unobtrusive UI elements showing data flow and security shields are subtly integrated into the desk surface. The overall style is a warm, inviting 3D isometric illustration with a focus on clarity and approachability.

name: crosspaste-desktop
readme_summary: CrossPaste Desktop is a cross-platform application that enables seamless clipboard sharing across multiple devices. It supports various data types, offers end-to-end encryption, and operates in a serverless, LAN-only mode for enhanced privacy.
key_features: Rich Type Support (Text, Color, URL, HTML, RTF, Image, File)
primary_use_case: To synchronize clipboard content across different devices and operating systems, allowing users to copy on one device and paste on another effortlessly.
cover_image_prompt: A magical, interconnected network of diverse devices (laptop, desktop, tablet, phone) floating in a serene digital space. Each device has a glowing stream of data flowing from its clipboard icon to a central, ethereal hub. This hub then distributes the data, represented as shimmering particles, to the clipboards of all other devices simultaneously. Subtle UI elements showing different data types like text, images, and files are visible within the streams. The overall mood is seamless, efficient, and secure, with a clean, modern aesthetic. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with soft, ambient lighting and a vibrant, yet harmonious color palette.

name: Agent-Skills-for-Context-Engineering
description: A comprehensive collection of Agent Skills for context engineering, multi-agent architectures, and production agent systems. Use when building, optimizing, or debugging agent systems that require effective context management.
readme_summary: This repository provides a comprehensive collection of Agent Skills for context engineering, focusing on optimizing how information is managed within an AI model's context window. It aims to enhance the effectiveness of production-grade AI agent systems by teaching principles of curating system prompts, tool definitions, message history, and tool outputs.
primary_use_case: Building, optimizing, and debugging AI agent systems that require advanced context management and effective information curation within limited context windows.
cover_image_prompt: A master librarian meticulously organizing a vast, glowing library where each book represents a piece of information. The librarian is carefully selecting and arranging specific books onto a central, illuminated pedestal, while discarding irrelevant tomes into a recycling bin. Subtle digital particles flow from the selected books to a nearby, abstract AI core, symbolizing efficient context curation. Small, holographic screens around the scene display snippets of text and data flow. The overall mood is one of focused intelligence and order, with a clean, modern aesthetic. The image should be in a 3D isometric illustration style with a vibrant, yet organized color palette, emphasizing clarity and precision.

name: claudecodeui
description: Use Claude Code, Cursor CLI or Codex on mobile and web with CloudCLI (aka Claude Code UI). CloudCLI is a free open source webui/GUI that helps you manage your Claude Code session and projects remotely
readme_summary: CloudCLI (Claude Code UI) provides a user-friendly web and mobile interface for interacting with various AI code assistants like Claude Code, Cursor CLI, Codex, and Gemini. It allows users to manage projects, sessions, and code directly through a graphical interface, accessible locally or remotely.
key_features: File Explorer with Syntax Highlighting and Live Editing
primary_use_case: To provide a unified, accessible, and feature-rich graphical user interface for managing and interacting with multiple AI code assistants across different devices.
cover_image_prompt: A digital workbench in a cozy, well-lit studio. In the center, a sleek, futuristic tablet displays a vibrant, interactive code editor with a chat interface on one side. Floating around the tablet are holographic representations of different AI assistants (Claude, Cursor, Codex, Gemini), each connected by glowing data streams. A stylized 'CloudCLI' logo is subtly integrated into the workbench's surface. The overall mood is one of creative productivity and seamless AI integration, rendered in a clean, modern 3D isometric illustration style with soft, inviting lighting and a palette of blues, purples, and whites.

name: GitNexus
description: GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine -       GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration
readme_summary: GitNexus is a client-side code intelligence engine that creates an interactive knowledge graph of any codebase directly in the browser or via a CLI. It enables AI agents to deeply understand code architecture, dependencies, and execution flows, enhancing their reliability and performance.
key_features: Codebase indexing (dependencies, call chains, clusters, execution flows)
Web UI for chat and exploration
CLI + MCP for AI agent integration
primary_use_case: To provide AI agents with a deep, architectural understanding of codebases for more reliable and intelligent code analysis and development.
cover_image_prompt: A wise, ancient librarian meticulously organizing an infinitely branching, glowing tree of interconnected books and scrolls. Each book represents a piece of code, and the glowing connections show dependencies and call chains. The librarian uses a magnifying glass that reveals intricate digital patterns within the books. In the background, subtle holographic projections display code snippets and architectural diagrams. The overall mood is one of deep understanding and discovery, with soft, ethereal lighting illuminating the scene. The style should be a detailed digital painting with a focus on intricate connections and a sense of vast knowledge.
